note: AUD5 fix for finding F-01 (docs/novakai/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: .mjs TOOLING, structure-only for the map — real verification is node --test tools/novakai/contract-gate.test.mjs (4 new DENY tests failed pre-fix, 10/10 post-fix).

intent.problem: AUD2 attack A1: the gate advertised '100% GATE' but any sentinel typo (NOVAKAI_CONTRACT), wrong case, missing id, or malformed stdin fell through as ALLOW — and contract-gate.test.mjs asserted that fail-open as REQUIRED behavior (AUD3 T3), so no fix could land without changing the tests.
intent.approach: DENY near-miss sentinels (compact token forms NOVAKAI[-_]CONTRACT any case; space-separated prose stays allowed), DENY unparseable stdin (the Agent|Task matcher guarantees the payload is an agent spawn), keep fail-open only for the gate's own internal faults, rewrite the header to its honest scope (Agent/Task spawns only; main-agent Edit/Write ungated by design). Tests updated first: 4 new DENY cases red pre-fix, plus the primary deny branch pinned by its reason text so the M2a masked-mutant redundancy stays live.
intent.rationale: the one deny the gate had was proven solid (AUD3 M2b caught); this extends fail-closed to everything sentinel-shaped or unverifiable while leaving recon/verify spawns untouched.
